description_long: This object consists of a flat-panel computer monitor with a black bezel and a rectangular base, accompanied by a full-sized black keyboard and a black optical mouse. The monitor's screen displays a web browser open to the Google homepage, suggesting it is powered on and functional. The bezel around the screen is moderately thick, with a matte black finish and slightly rounded corners, giving it a modern yet utilitarian appearance. The stand is a wide, flat pedestal that provides stability, and the rear of the monitor is a light gray color, contrasting with the black front. The keyboard features a standard QWERTY layout with a slightly curved ergonomic design, while the mouse is contoured for comfortable hand placement. No visible ports, buttons, or brand logos are apparent on the monitor from any angle.
description: A flat-panel computer monitor with a black bezel and pedestal stand, paired with a black keyboard and mouse. The screen displays a web browser, and the overall design is modern and functional.
description_view_0: Front view showing the monitor's screen with a web browser, the full keyboard, and the mouse clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the monitor's slim profile, the depth of the stand, and the relative positions of the keyboard and mouse.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the light gray back of the monitor and the edges of the keyboard and mouse.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the monitor's thinness and the angled arrangement of the keyboard and mouse.
attribute_screen_bezel_design: The bezel is moderately thick, matte black, with slightly rounded corners and a smooth, untextured finish. It frames the display area evenly on all sides with no decorative elements.
attribute_stand_type: The stand is a wide, flat pedestal base made of black plastic, rectangular in shape, and appears solid with no visible adjustability features.
attribute_button_placement: No physical buttons or controls are visible on the front, sides, or base of the monitor.
